endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/acl
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of access control list (ACL) entries for the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of databases from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified database from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/acl
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of access control list (ACL) entries for the database from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/assemblies
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of assemblies from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/assemblies/{assemblyName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified assembly from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ASSEMBLYNAME}} with a real assemblyname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/credentials
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of credentials from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/credentials/{credentialName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified credential from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CREDENTIALNAME}} with a real credentialname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: POST /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/credentials/{credentialName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified credential in the specified database
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CREDENTIALNAME}} with a real credentialname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: PUT /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/credentials/{credentialName}
endpoints.description: Creates the specified credential for use with external data sources in the specified database.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CREDENTIALNAME}} with a real credentialname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/credentials/{credentialName}
endpoints.description: Modifies the specified credential for use with external data sources in the specified database
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CREDENTIALNAME}} with a real credentialname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/externaldatasources
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of external data sources from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/externaldatasources/{externalDataSourceName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified external data source from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EXTERNALDATASOURCENAME}} with a real externaldatasourcename. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of schemas from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified schema from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/packages
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of packages from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/packages/{packageName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified package from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/procedures
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of procedures from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/procedures/{procedureName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified procedure from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{PROCEDURENAME}} with a real procedurename. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/statistics
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of all table statistics within the specified schema from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of tables from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified table from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/partitions
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of table partitions from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/partitions/{partitionName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified table partition from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTITIONNAME}} with a real partitionname. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/partitions/{partitionName}/previewrows
endpoints.description: Retrieves a preview set of rows in given partition.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTITIONNAME}} with a real partitionname. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/previewrows
endpoints.description: Retrieves a preview set of rows in given table.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/statistics
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of table statistics from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/statistics/{statisticsName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified table statistics from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{STATISTICSNAME}} with a real statisticsname. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tables/{tableName}/tablefragments
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of table fragments from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TABLENAME}} with a real tablename. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tabletypes
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of table types from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tabletypes/{tableTypeName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified table type from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{TABLETYPENAME}} with a real tabletypename. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tablevaluedfunctions
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of table valued functions from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/tablevaluedfunctions/{tableValuedFunctionName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified table valued function from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{TABLEVALUEDFUNCTIONNAME}} with a real tablevaluedfunctionname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/types
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of types within the specified database and schema from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/views
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of views from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/schemas/{schemaName}/views/{viewName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified view from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SCHEMANAME}} with a real schemaname. Replace {{VIEWNAME}} with a real viewname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/secrets
endpoints.description: Deletes all secrets in the specified database. This is deprecated and will be removed in the next release. In the future, please only drop individual credentials using DeleteCredential
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified secret in the specified database. This is deprecated and will be removed in the next release. Please use GetCredential instead.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: PUT /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Creates the specified secret for use with external data sources in the specified database. This is deprecated and will be removed in the next release. Please use CreateCredential instead.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified secret in the specified database. This is deprecated and will be removed in the next release. Please use DeleteCredential instead.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Modifies the specified secret for use with external data sources in the specified database. This is deprecated and will be removed in the next release. Please use UpdateCredential instead.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/statistics
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of all statistics in a database from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/tables
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of all tables in a database from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/tablevaluedfunctions
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of all table valued functions in a database from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: GET /catalog/usql/databases/{databaseName}/views
endpoints.description: Retrieves the list of all views in a database from the Data Lake Analytics catalog.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.
